name: Feature DoR — MF Servicing Extensions (Starter Draft)
description: Placeholder feature-level criteria for MF Servicing.
placeholder_note: Starter content. Replace with real MF Servicing feature DoR criteria.

criteria.name: Sub-Servicer SLA Targets Defined
criteria.description: Sub-servicer-level SLAs (file delivery time, exception resolution time) the feature must support are stated.
criteria.why: Servicing features without explicit SLAs end up at the mercy of the worst-performing sub-servicer.
criteria.fix: Document the SLA bar (e.g. 99.9% file delivery within 4h of receipt) and the exception escalation path.
criteria.good_example: Daily activity files must be ingested within 4h of receipt with 99.9% completeness. Exceptions auto-escalate to MF Ops on-call after 6h.
